sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56868" key="kerki=tis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κερκ-ῖτις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, a kind of <sense id="n56868.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">olive</tr_> (cf. Lat. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">radius</tr_>), prob. in Colum.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.8.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
